programme.title: Supermarket Sweep

programme.title: Rush - Time Machine: Live in Cleveland
programme.desc: Celebrating 30 years since the 1981 release of their classic bestselling album 'Moving Pictures,' the band performed the entire album live for the first time as the centerpiece of the concerts.

programme.title: Journey - Live in Manila
programme.desc: On March 14, 2009, Journey returned to Arnel Pineda's homeland and introduced him as their newest lead singer to a crowd of nearly 30,000 at the SM Mall of Asia Concert Grounds. Features songs such as Don't Stop Believin', Stone In Love, When You Lov...

programme.title: The Killers - Live at Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: The Killers perform at Rock Am Ring, a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in Western Germany, with tracks like When You Were Young and The World We Live In.

programme.title: Kiss - Live in Nürburgring
programme.desc: KISS impress an audience of more than 85,000 people, in a show of more than two hours and packed with hits, held at the Nürburgring, Germany in 2010.

programme.title: Michael Kiwanuka: Garorock Festival 2017
programme.desc: Watch Michael Kiwanuka's performance at the Garorock Festival in 2017.

programme.title: The Everly Brothers Reunion Concert
programme.desc: The 1983 London reunion features "Bye, Bye Love," "Wake Up Little Suzie," "Bird Dog" and "Cathy's Clown."

programme.title: Coldplay - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Florence + the Machine -- Live at Apple Music Festival
programme.desc: Following a week of class acts, Florence Welch celebrated both the final night of 2015's Apple Music Festival and her father's birthday with a flawless performance at London's Roundhouse.

programme.title: Lenny Kravitz - Live at the iTunes Festival
programme.desc: Lenny Kravitz has been consolidated as one of the stars that has been in force for a long time, this has led him to appear all over the world and be part of the most popular festivals in the world.

programme.title: Rihanna: No Regrets
programme.desc: She has been referred to as one of the most powerful celebrities of our time and has been characterised as one of the most influential people in the world.

programme.title: Snoop Dogg: Uncaged
programme.desc: From Crime to Primetime. For over five decades rapper, songwriter, and media personality Calvin Cordozar Broadus Jr. aka 'Snoop Dogg' would go onto global fame, with tens of millions of record sales and a career in movies and television.

programme.title: Something from Nothing: The Art of Rap
programme.desc: Ice-T travels coast to coast interviewing rap performers such as Q-Tip, Common and Kanye West to pay tribute to the musical art form.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: El Debarge opens up about his history with drugs and how it influences his music. We also learn about hits from Lloyd and The Newboyz.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Legendary Rapper Nas and Damien Marley have teamed up to give audiences the best of both worlds in rap and reggae.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Bruno Mars, fresh off his Super Bowl 2012 performance hangs out with our host to talk shop about his craft and the secret to his success. We also travel to Asia to see what is happening with the Far East Movement.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Chingy is making a comeback, the man who brought bubble gum rap back to life talks about how he fell off and now has reinvented himself. Witness Tamar Braxton film yet another new video.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Mary J Blige is a legend who is finding her place in today's music industry. She talks ups and downs and Diggy Simmons speaks on the future of rap.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: British singer Estelle and producer Alex the Kidd talk about comebacks and their hometown of London, England.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Christina Aguilera and Rihanna, two superstars, sit down with us to talk about why they have succeeded when so many others have failed.

programme.title: Music Talks: Babyface
programme.desc: An interview between Andre Harrell and Babyface discussing music, the "Soul Train Music Awards," and more.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Felipe Luciano hosts this showcase of Latin music on Soul! Features musicians Tito Puente and Willie Colon, accompanied by their musical groups.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Female singing trio LaBelle and conga drum/bongo musician Mongo Santamaria, are guests of Ellis Haizlip.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Guests include musical attractions Exuma, Taj Mahal, and actress Cicely Tyson, star of the motion picture, Sounder.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Guests include Tony Award-winning singer Linda Hopkins and the musical group Earth, Wind & Fire.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a little imagination and lots of colors to create this soft, luxurious early autumn lake scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even the oval in this delightful Bob Ross cabin-by-the-river painting cannot contain all the succulent, glorious foliage!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A painting to reflect the essence of fall, bursting forth in a profusion of brilliant colors as Bob Ross creates a haven of tranquility on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cabin has found a peaceful resting place amongst a warm setting of lush, lakeside greenery in this wonderful oval creation by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with artist Bob Ross and peer into the north country in the midst of winter; experience a vision in the coldest of azure tones.

programme.title: Bob Ross: The Happy Painter
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the beloved painter's journey from humble beginnings to pop-culture icon, how one local TV ad evolved into a phenomenon.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Melting snow from the mountains creates a rushing flow of water into a valley just awakening for spring. Feel the crisp new season with Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Look into the distance with Bob Ross and experience the peace and quiet of a stoic mountain overlooking a smooth-as-glass wilderness lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Strong mountains, proud evergreens, and luxurious trees and bushes hug the velvety smooth foothills in today's Bob Ross masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on this colorful Bob Ross display of nature's exciting seashore panarama … beautifully tucked within an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Get caught up in the magic as you watch Bob Ross produce a snowy summit and beautiful lake surrounded by shades of greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Steve Ross invites you to experience the refreshing beauty of a highland lake and its gentle splashing waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he creates a beautiful snowy landscape with stately evergreens, warmed by winter sun hanging low over distant mountains.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch as Bob Ross treats us to a mountain lake masterpiece enclosed in an oval - with bountiful foliage and bushes bursting out!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' easy method once again reveals the splendor of a little farm home in a winter wonderland and soft purple hills.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the night settles over a rocky coast, Bob Ross gives you a warm glow still in the sky - a painting achieved on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins paints an evening thunderstorm that calls back to Bob Ross's final episode of The Joy of Painting for inspiration.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross finds a barely visible lake being hugged by snowy mountains and some of nature's finest greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join artist Bob Ross under turbulent skies as the windy waves rush to crash upon the rocks - all within a pleasing oval shape

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drink in the breathtaking beauty of spectacular cascades deep in the timberland. Bob Ross invites you create this astonishing scenic display.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old weathered dwelling today, burrowed deep in the snow and lined with protective evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Out of nowhere appears an unexpected find -- a weathered cottage in the deep forest that Bob Ross places there, in an already perfect setting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uncovers the extraordinary loveliness of nature, reflected in the mirror surface of a lake in front of a mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Breaking the silence of a misty morning is a rippling brook through the forest. Join Bob Ross as he takes you to this favorite escape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The soft sky and snow-blanketed ground give this cozy barn a quiet place to sleep and dream a while; Bob Ross's paintbrushes make it happen.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Envision yourself in a world of purple mountain tops and glistening waters that reflect the glowing sky; a magical Bob Ross scene!

programme.desc: Some friends argue over whether a new slang phrase is a "thing," a man learns the truth about his father's Hollywood past, and the valets come to Anne Hathaway's defense.

programme.title: Key & Peele
programme.desc: Mr. Garvey clashes with students over club photos, and President Obama addresses the NSA scandal.

programme.title: MST3K: Carnival Magic
programme.desc: Kinga, drops a bombshell on Jonah before plunging him into a world of bare-chested carnies, talking chimps, brooding magicians and young love.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Overdrawn At The Memory Bank
programme.desc: A weather tech's mind gets trapped in a computer and Pearl establishes her own public television pledge program.

programme.title: MST3K: Parts: The Clonus Horror
programme.desc: Scientists run a clone farm for VIPs while Pearl and her goons are forced into babysitting omnipotent Space Children.

programme.title: MST3K: Pod People
programme.desc: A child adopts a large egg which hatches into a mischievous alien, while a group of pop musicians on a wilderness vacation runs into trouble.

programme.title: MST3K: Prince Of Space
programme.desc: A wimpy space hero kicks tyrannical aliens off of Earth while the Widowmaker and the SOL are sucked through a wormhole.

programme.title: MST3K: Project Moonbase
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch two more Commando Cody episodes and a film about a sabotaged space station. They also introduce their new product SPACOM to the Mads.

programme.title: MST3K: Quest Of The Delta Knights
programme.desc: Pearl sits in on part of this week's experiment as part of her annual review, and Leonardo da Vinci stops by.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dying of gunshot wounds, private investigator Charlie Harper whispers one final cryptic message to Dr. Sloan. Intrigued, Sloan searches for the meaning of the dying man's last words with the aid of Charlie's secretary, Georgia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's sister Dora is moving to town. She needs a place to stay overnight while her new home is fumigated; however, they soon discover that more than just bugs have been exterminated.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In a grueling fight that leaves both competitors hospitalized, undefeated boxing legend, Mercury The Heat Jones loses the world middleweight title to Tommy Brackett.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Selected by Bravo Magazine as one of L.A.'s most eligible bachelors, Dr. Jack Stewart isn't aware the honor is dangerous to his health.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amidst the corridors of Community General Hospital, the hit t.v. show The New Healers is shooting their next episode.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Refusing to believe that a long-time patient, Alex Forman, committed suicide, Dr. Sloan launches his own investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: What could be more dangerous than a psychopathic killer with a taste for revenge! Eddie Gault, recently paroled, has only one thing on his mind--making Lt. Steve Sloan suffer for putting him in prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Searching for a new way to promote Community General, Norman Briggs decides to have the hospital sponsor a women's professional volleyball team.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's not just another day at the beach when an investigative reporter out for her daily swim drowns. The lifeguard, Rip, is blamed for the death despite his protests of innocence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A night school class in law draws Lieutenant Steve Sloan into another police investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's not child's play when Amanda Bentley's long-time friend Angela Pearson shows up on her doorstep ready to give birth to quadruplets and then disappears after the children are born.

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Bananas
programme.desc: Woody Allen's humor is at his wild and bizarre best in this story of a "weird-gadget" tester who, after being jilted by his girlfriend (Louise Lasser), ends up as president of a tiny country where absurdity reigns.

programme.title: Ghoulies
programme.desc: When a college student inherits an old mansion he finds he has also inherited its residents--a bunch of slimy, hairy, fanged creatures who'll do anything for him, even kill.

programme.title: Ghoulies II
programme.desc: The Ghoulies are back in this sequel in which they take over a traveling carnival giving a park full of teenagers a night they'll never forget.

programme.title: C.H.U.D.
programme.desc: A bizarre series of sudden disappearances on the streets of New York City seems to point toward something unsavory living in the sewers.

programme.title: Troll
programme.desc: When an evil troll named Torok attempts to bring about cataclysmic changes that will forever erase mankind, an ancient sorceress and a young boy join forces to stop him before he can carry out his diabolical plan.

programme.title: Dolls
programme.desc: The Hartwicke's vast collection of dolls is fun to play with and nice to look at, but beneath the painted faces of their lifelike dolls lie murderous creatures with a vengeance for blood!

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When serial killer Charles Lee Ray is mortally wounded in a police shoot-out, he uses a voodoo spell to transfer his soul into Chucky, a Good Guys doll. Young Andy receives the doll as a birthday gift, and Chucky soon resumes his killing spree.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: A warlock and witch-hunter time travel from the 1600s to the 1990s, as the warlock searches for ultimate control of Satan's Bible and the destruction of all creation.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Election
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon plays Tracy Flick, a straight-A go-getter determined to be president of Carver High’s student body. Popular teacher Jim McAllister (Broderick) decides to derail Tracy’s obsessive overachieving by recruiting an opposition candidate.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: Girl, Interrupted
programme.desc: Winona Ryder and Academy Award(r)-winner Angelina Jolie are the certifiable stars of Claymoore Hospital's South Bell ward in this wry adaptation of Susanna Kaysen's best-selling memoir.

programme.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story
programme.desc: Dewey Cox had it all: the women (over 411), the friends (Elvis) and the rock 'n' roll lifestyle (every pill and powder). But most of all, he had the music that transformed a dimwitted country boy into the greatest American rock star who never lived.

programme.title: Eurotrip
programme.desc: Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!

programme.title: Sex Drive
programme.desc: When an online hottie offers to help him become a man, Ian embarks on a wild road trip to a sure thing.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Eurotrip
programme.desc: Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!

programme.title: Bart Got a Room
programme.desc: While Danny's father and mother independently search for love, Danny is on his own desperate quest to find a prom date.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: The Night Of The Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: Whoever Slew Auntie Roo?
programme.desc: Shelley Winters puts the Grande in Grande Dame Guignol in this atmospheric chiller! After the death of her daughter, Auntie Roo (Winters) has been looking for a 'dead ringer' replacement. And this time she found one...from the local orphanage!

programme.title: The Big Knife
programme.desc: Hollywood star Charlie Castle (Jack Palance) has it all... but no way out. When he tries to quit show business, his studio boss (Rod Steiger) blackmails him with a secret. Now, he could lose everything... including his soul! Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: Kiss Me, Stupid
programme.desc: In this comic gem from the legendary Billy Wilder and his long-time writing partner I.A.L. Diamond, Dean Martin is a famous singer targeted by two would-be songwriters who encourage a waitress (Kim Novak) to coerce Dino into a song-buying mood.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Disturbia
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Disturbia
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: King of Thieves
programme.desc: When a vindictive bandit threatens the peace of a flourishing kingdom, the native mystical and worldly forces must come together to save the day.

programme.title: Killshot
programme.desc: A veteran assassin (Mickey Rourke) and his young partner (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) pursue a couple (Diane Lane, Thomas Jane) who stumbled upon an extortion scheme and entered the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: While trying to convince a disgraced ex-cop (Sam Worthington) to come in from a high-rise ledge, a police negotiator (Elizabeth Banks) begins to realize that the man has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: Marauders
programme.desc: FBI agents (Christopher Meloni, Dave Bautista) uncover a conspiracy while trying to nail a group of deadly bank robbers.

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes
programme.desc: An FBI agent (Chiwetel Ejiofor) spends 13 years investigating the brutal murder of a colleague's (Julia Roberts) daughter, then uncovers a new clue that leads to a dark and shocking secret.

programme.title: Texas Killing Fields
programme.desc: After a familiar girl goes missing, two detectives race against time before a serial killer claims her as his next victim.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: A former boxer cares for his autistic son while working as an enforcer for a family of drug dealers in rural Ireland.

programme.title: Kinky Boots
programme.desc: To save his family's shoe business from imminent bankruptcy, young Charlie Price turns to an unlikely new creative consultant: a fabulous drag queen whose creative style and wild designs are a breath of fresh air in the stuffy old factory.

programme.title: Dicks: The Musical
programme.desc: Two self-obsessed businessmen discover they're identical twins and plot to reunite their eccentric divorced parents. A riotously funny and debaucherous musical starring Megan Thee Stallion, Nathan Lane, Megan Mullally, and Bowen Yang.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: A Chinese Yuppie living in New York who decides that a marriage of convenience is the perfect way to prevent his parents back in Taiwan from discovering he is gay. But his plan backfires when his parents insist on coming to New York for the wedding.

programme.title: Eat Drink Man Woman
programme.desc: A delicious comedy about food, fatherhood and family ties. Widower Tao Chu, Taiwan's most famous chef, struggles with accepting his three daughters' appetite for boys, an interest that begins to break the family apart with hilarious and touching results.

programme.title: Weekend
programme.desc: A drunken one-night stand turns into a deeper romance over the course of a booze, drug and sex filled weekend.

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: Kinky Boots
programme.desc: To save his family's shoe business from imminent bankruptcy, young Charlie Price turns to an unlikely new creative consultant: a fabulous drag queen whose creative style and wild designs are a breath of fresh air in the stuffy old factory.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: When the world's most beautiful people are in danger, former models Derek and Hansel are recruited for a top secret mission to defeat the criminal mastermind Mugatu. Prepare for a dangerously sexy adventure where looks really can kill.

programme.title: Tropic Thunder
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black and Robert Downey Jr. lead an ensemble cast in 'Tropic Thunder,' an action comedy about a group of self-absorbed actors who set out to make the most expensive war film.

programme.title: Fences
programme.desc: Set in the 1950s Pittsburgh, the film adaptation of August Wilson’s Pulitzer Prize-winning play takes a passionate look at former baseball player Troy Maxson as he fights to provide for those he loves in a world that threatens to push him down.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (2016)
programme.desc: Director Antoine Fuqua brings his modern vision to the classic western, a story of seven outlaws who join together to save a town from an evil industrialist! Denzel Washington, Chris Pratt, Ethan Hawke and Vincent D'Onofrio and Peter Sarsgaard star!

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller as the Chief of Police of a small town who finds himself caught in the eye of a storm as he investigates the murder of a woman he was secretly seeing….because all the evidence points to him!

programme.title: Popeye
programme.desc: The legendary, beloved anvil-armed sailor of the seven seas comes magically to life in this delightful musical, starring Robin Williams as Popeye, who meets all challenges with the unshakable philosophy, "I yam what I yam and that's all that I yam."

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest
programme.desc: The public Crawford was strong-willed, glamorous and admirable, but Mommie Dearest reveals the private Crawford, the woman desperate to be a mother, adopting her children when she was single and trying to survive in the devastating movie industry.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Earth Girls Are Easy
programme.desc: Three aliens (Jim Carrey, Damon Wayans, and Jeff Goldblum) crash-land in Los Angeles' San Fernando Valley. A manicurist (Geena Davis) and her boss (the wacky Julie Brown) befriend the threesome, give them makeovers and show them the town.

programme.title: Popeye
programme.desc: The legendary, beloved anvil-armed sailor of the seven seas comes magically to life in this delightful musical, starring Robin Williams as Popeye, who meets all challenges with the unshakable philosophy, "I yam what I yam and that's all that I yam."

programme.title: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: After making their way through high school (twice), big changes are in store for officers Schmidt (Jonah Hill) and Jenko (Channing Tatum) when they go deep undercover at a local college.

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.title: Nacho Libre. (ENG)
programme.desc: Jack Black is more hilarious than ever as Ignacio, a monastery cook who feeds orphan children by day and by night transforms himself into Nacho Libre, a notorious Luchador in stretchy pants.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Here Comes the Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches to raise money to save the school's music program.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Allied
programme.desc: When Intelligence Officer Max Vatan (Brad Pitt) learns his wife (Academy Award winner Marion Cotillard) may be conspiring with the enemy, he has only 72 hours to prove her innocence and save his family before he must do the unthinkable.

programme.title: Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: The summer of 1964... Two FBI agents--one a tight-jawed, by-the-book type, the other an experienced Southern lawman who knows how to handle people--head the government's investigation into the disappearance of three civil rights activists in Mississippi.

programme.desc: When Intelligence Officer Max Vatan (Brad Pitt) learns his wife (Academy Award winner Marion Cotillard) may be conspiring with the enemy, he has only 72 hours to prove her innocence and save his family before he must do the unthinkable.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill
programme.desc: On the 11th May 1969, troops of the 101st airborne division engaged the enemy at the base of Hill 937 in the Ashau Valley. Ten days and eleven bloody assaults later, the troops who fought there called it Hamburger Hill.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers

programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II

programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.title: Damsel

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones stars in “the best western since UNFORGIVEN” (BBC). A low-life drifter helps a headstrong woman (Hilary Swank) cross the frontier after she rescues him from hanging.

programme.title: Wild Horses
